Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There seems to be no one inside...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru doesn't seem to be in her room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru doesn't seem to be in her room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4055 0 0}I've caused trouble for you too... I think I would prefer to be alone at the moment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Perhaps you should study. I'm about to review my own notes now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It helps to take your mind off things...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}I'm sure you have a lot on your mind, but try to concentrate on the upcoming exams for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru is in her room.[n]I wonder if she's okay...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems to be studying.[n]I shouldn't bother her...[n]{f 1 1}
